summary: Completed backend testing for BITZ Club email notification system. All email notifications are working correctly with MOCKED email service logging to console.
passed_tests: Lead submission API (/api/leads) - creates lead and triggers email to leads@bitzclub.com
Member creation API (/api/members) - creates member and triggers email to admin@bitzclub.com
Lead email contains: Name, Mobile, City, Interested In (verified in source code)
Membership email contains: Member Name, Membership ID, Plan, Join Date, Referral ID (verified in source code)
Database persistence - leads and members saved correctly
Referral ID functionality - properly stored and filtered
All CRUD operations for plans, partners, telecallers working
Dashboard stats and reporting endpoints functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% - All APIs functional, email notifications working as MOCKED service
